question: Ta yaya VAT ke shafar farashin kaya?
answer: VAT yana ƙara farashin kaya da ayyuka ga masu amfani na ƙarshe.

question: Shin VAT yana da muhimmanci ga tattalin arziki?
answer: Eh, VAT na taimaka wa gwamnati samun kuɗin shiga don ayyukan jama'a.

question: Menene bambanci tsakanin VAT da sauran haraji?
answer: VAT yana shafar siye da siyarwa kai tsaye, yayin da wasu haraji ke shafar samun kuɗi ko dukiya.

question: Yaushe ake biyan VAT?
answer: Ana biyan VAT a lokacin siye ko lokacin da aka bayar da sabis.

question: Ta yaya gwamnati ke sarrafa VAT?
answer: Gwamnati tana tattara VAT ta hanyar dillalai da kamfanoni da ke sayar da kaya da sabis.

question: Shin VAT yana da tasiri a kan farashin kasuwa?
answer: Eh, VAT na iya ƙara farashin kasuwa saboda ƙarin kuɗin haraji.

question: Waɗanne kaya ake keɓancewa daga VAT?
answer: Wasu kayan abinci da sabis na lafiya na iya kasancewa cikin keɓe daga VAT.

question: Menene ma'anar aiki kai tsaye (self-employed)?
answer: Aiki kai tsaye yana nufin mutum yana gudanar da kasuwanci ko aiki ba tare da mai ɗaukar aiki ba.

question: Ta yaya masu aiki da kansu ke biyan haraji?
answer: Suna biyan haraji bisa ribar kasuwancinsu bayan cire kudin aiki.

question: Shin masu kasuwanci suna da wajibin haraji?
answer: Eh, duk masu kasuwanci dole su biya haraji bisa doka.

question: Waɗanne ƙa'idoji ne masu sana'a ƙanana za su bi wajen biyan haraji?
answer: Masu sana'a ƙanana dole ne su yi rajista, su riƙa adana bayanan kuɗaɗensu, su bayyana kuɗin shiga, sannan su biya haraji a kan lokaci.

question: Ta yaya 'yan kasuwa ke samun riba daga kasuwanci a Nijeriya?
answer: 'Yan kasuwa suna samun riba ta hanyar sayar da kaya ko ayyuka fiye da farashin da suka kashe, tare da kula da kashe kuɗi da tsara kasuwanci yadda ya dace.

question: Waɗanne bayanai ya kamata mai sana'a ya adana?
answer: Ya kamata a adana rikodin kudin shiga, kashe kuɗi, rasit, da sauran takardun kasuwanci na aƙalla shekaru shida.

question: Shin gwamnati tana tallafa wa ƙananan 'yan kasuwa?
answer: Eh, gwamnati na iya ba da tallafi kamar rangwamen haraji, horo, da shirye-shiryen ci gaban kasuwanci.

question: Ta yaya ake amfani da takardun kasuwanci wajen haraji?
answer: Ana amfani da takardu kamar rasit da bayanan banki wajen tantance kuɗin shiga da harajin da za a biya.

question: Shin ya dace a ɓoye kuɗin shiga domin rage haraji?
answer: A'a, ɓoye kuɗin shiga laifi ne kuma yana iya jawo tara ko hukunci daga hukuma.

question: Waɗanne wajibai ne ke kan masu sana'a?
answer: Dole ne su yi rajista, su riƙa bayar da rahoto na haraji, su biya haraji a kan lokaci, kuma su kiyaye dokokin kasuwanci.

question: Wanene ke da damar samun rangwamen haraji a Nijeriya?
answer: Wasu ƙungiyoyi kamar na agaji, addini, da ilimi na iya samun rangwamen haraji idan sun cika sharuddan doka.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 162 & Fifth Schedule

question: Menene rangwamen haraji?
answer: Rangwamen haraji yana nufin rage ko cire wasu kuɗin haraji da ya kamata a biya bisa doka.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 162 & Fifth Schedule

question: Ta yaya ake samun rangwamen haraji?
answer: Ana samun rangwame ta hanyar cika sharuddan doka da kuma gabatar da takardun da suka dace ga hukumar haraji.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 162 & Fifth Schedule

question: Shin kowa na iya samun rangwamen haraji?
answer: A'a, sai waɗanda suka cancanta bisa ga dokokin haraji ne kawai za su iya samun rangwame.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 162 & Fifth Schedule

question: Shin akwai kudaden shiga da ba a saka musu haraji?
answer: Eh, wasu kudaden shiga kamar na agaji ko tallafi na iya zama ba su da haraji.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 162 & Fifth Schedule

question: Ta yaya gudummawa ke shafar haraji?
answer: Wasu gudummawa na iya rage harajin da za a biya idan an amince da su a doka.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 162 & Fifth Schedule

question: Shin kuɗin kula da lafiya na samun rangwame?
answer: A wasu lokuta, kuɗin kula da lafiya na iya samun rangwame bisa ga dokar haraji.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 162 & Fifth Schedule

question: Ta yaya ake amfani da rangwamen haraji?
answer: Ana amfani da rangwame wajen rage jimillar harajin da mutum ko kamfani zai biya.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 162 & Fifth Schedule

question: Me zai faru idan aka yi amfani da rangwame ba daidai ba?
answer: Yin amfani da rangwame ba daidai ba na iya jawo tara ko hukunci daga hukuma.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 162 & Fifth Schedule

question: Me ya kamata a yi kafin neman rangwame?
answer: Ya kamata a tabbatar da cika dukkan sharudda da kuma tattara takardun da ake bukata.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 162 & Fifth Schedule

question: Menene harajin dijital?
answer: Harajin dijital haraji ne da ake ɗora wa ayyukan kasuwanci na yanar gizo da kamfanonin fasaha.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 9; SEP Order 2020

question: Shin kamfanonin waje suna biyan harajin dijital a Nijeriya?
answer: Eh, idan suna samar da ayyuka ga 'yan Nijeriya, ana iya tilasta musu biyan haraji.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 9; SEP Order 2020

question: Waɗanne wajibai ne ke kan kasuwancin dijital?
answer: Dole ne su yi rajista, su bayyana kuɗin shiga, kuma su biya haraji kamar yadda doka ta tanada.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 9; SEP Order 2020

question: Ta yaya ake biyan harajin dijital?
answer: Ana biya ta hanyar tsarin lantarki da hukumar haraji ta tanada.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 9; SEP Order 2020

question: Me yasa ake buƙatar rikodin kasuwancin dijital?
answer: Domin tabbatar da sahihancin bayanai da kuma tantance harajin da za a biya.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 9; SEP Order 2020

question: Menene haramun a kasuwancin dijital?
answer: Cin hanci, ɓoye bayanai, da gujewa haraji duk haramun ne.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 9; SEP Order 2020

question: Waɗanne dokoki ke kula da kasuwancin dijital?
answer: Dokokin haraji da na fasahar sadarwa ne ke tsara yadda ake gudanar da kasuwancin dijital.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 9; SEP Order 2020

question: Shin duk kasuwancin dijital suna biyan haraji?
answer: Eh, duk kasuwancin dijital da ke samun kuɗin shiga daga Nijeriya dole ne su biya haraji bisa doka.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 9; SEP Order 2020

question: Menene hukuncin gujewa harajin dijital?
answer: Gujewa haraji laifi ne kuma yana iya jawo tara mai tsanani ko hukunci daga hukuma.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 9; SEP Order 2020

question: Ta yaya gwamnati ke sa ido kan kasuwancin dijital?
answer: Gwamnati na amfani da tsarin fasaha da bayanan banki don bibiyar kudaden shiga na kasuwancin dijital.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 9; SEP Order 2020

question: Menene haraji a sauƙaƙe?
answer: Haraji kuɗi ne da gwamnati ke karɓa daga mutane da kamfanoni domin samar da ayyukan jama'a.

question: Me ya sa ake biyan haraji?
answer: Ana biyan haraji domin gwamnati ta samar da abubuwa kamar hanyoyi, makarantu, asibitoci da tsaro.

question: Wa ke da alhakin biyan haraji?
answer: Duk wanda ke samun kuɗin shiga ko yana gudanar da kasuwanci yana da alhakin biyan haraji.

question: Menene bambanci tsakanin haraji da tara?
answer: Haraji wajibin kuɗi ne da ake biya ga gwamnati, yayin da tara hukunci ne da ake biya saboda karya doka.

question: Shin biyan haraji wajibi ne?
answer: Eh, biyan haraji wajibi ne bisa doka, kuma rashin biya na iya jawo hukunci.

question: Menene kudin shiga da ake saka haraji?
answer: Kudin shiga ya haɗa da albashi, ribar kasuwanci, da sauran hanyoyin samun kuɗi.

question: Ta yaya ake ƙididdige haraji?
answer: Ana ƙididdige haraji ne bisa ga yawan kuɗin shiga da kuma ƙa'idodin da doka ta tanada.

question: Wa ke tattara haraji a Nijeriya?
answer: Hukumar haraji ta ƙasa da na jihohi ne ke da alhakin tattara haraji.

question: Me zai faru idan ba a biya haraji ba?
answer: Rashin biyan haraji na iya jawo tara, ƙarin kuɗi, ko hukunci daga hukuma.

question: Shin ana iya biyan haraji a kashi-kashi?
answer: A wasu lokuta, ana iya ba da damar biyan haraji a kashi-kashi bisa yarjejeniya da hukumar haraji.

question: Menene takardar shaidar biyan haraji?
answer: Takardar shaidar biyan haraji hujja ce da ke nuna cewa an biya haraji kamar yadda doka ta tanada.

question: Me ake bukata kafin a fara biyan haraji?
answer: Ana bukatar yin rajista da samun lambar shaidar mai biyan haraji (TIN).

question: Menene muhimmancin biyan haraji ga ƙasa?
answer: Biyan haraji yana taimakawa wajen ci gaban ƙasa ta hanyar samar da kuɗin ayyukan gwamnati da inganta rayuwar jama'a.

question: Menene TIN a Nijeriya?
answer: TIN (Tax Identification Number) wata lamba ce ta musamman da ake bai wa masu biyan haraji domin tantance su a tsarin haraji.

question: Ta yaya zan yi rajistar TIN?
answer: Za ka iya yin rajistar TIN ta hanyar ziyartar ofishin haraji ko ta dandalin yanar gizo na hukumar haraji tare da cikakken bayananka.

question: Zan iya canza bayanan TIN dina?
answer: Eh, za ka iya sabunta ko canza bayananka na TIN ta hanyar hukumar haraji idan akwai canje-canje kamar adireshi ko kasuwanci.

question: Me zai faru idan ban yi rajistar TIN ba?
answer: Idan ba ka da TIN, ba za ka iya yin wasu muhimman mu'amaloli ba kuma za ka iya fuskantar tara ko hukunci daga hukuma.

question: Shin kamfanoni suna bukatar TIN?
answer: Eh, dukkan kamfanoni da 'yan kasuwa suna bukatar TIN domin gudanar da harkokinsu bisa doka.

question: Menene PAYE?
answer: PAYE (Pay As You Earn) tsarin haraji ne inda ake cire haraji daga albashin ma'aikata kai tsaye kafin a biya su.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 13; PAYE Regulations 2025

question: Waye ke da alhakin cire PAYE?
answer: Mai aiki (employer) ne ke da alhakin cire harajin PAYE daga albashin ma'aikata.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 13; PAYE Regulations 2025

question: Yaushe ake biyan PAYE?
answer: Ana biyan PAYE duk wata bayan cire shi daga albashi, yawanci kafin ranar da doka ta kayyade.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 13; PAYE Regulations 2025

question: Me zai faru idan ba a biya PAYE ba?
answer: Rashin biyan PAYE na iya jawo tara, ƙarin kuɗi, ko hukunci daga hukumar haraji.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 13; PAYE Regulations 2025

question: Shin ma'aikaci zai iya duba PAYE dinsa?
answer: Eh, ma'aikaci na iya duba bayanan harajinsa ta hanyar takardun albashi ko ta hukumar haraji.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 13; PAYE Regulations 2025

question: Shin PAYE yana aiki ga duk ma'aikata?
answer: Eh, PAYE yana aiki ga yawancin ma'aikatan da ke samun albashi a Nijeriya.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 13; PAYE Regulations 2025

question: Yaya ake lissafa PAYE?
answer: Ana lissafa PAYE bisa ga adadin albashi da ƙa'idodin haraji da gwamnati ta kafa.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 13; PAYE Regulations 2025

question: Shin ana iya samun rangwame a PAYE?
answer: Eh, akwai wasu rangwame da ake bayarwa kamar personal relief allowance da sauran deductions.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 13; PAYE Regulations 2025

question: Menene takardar PAYE?
answer: Takardar PAYE tana nuna adadin harajin da aka cire daga albashin ma'aikaci.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 13; PAYE Regulations 2025

question: Ta yaya zan kai ƙorafi game da PAYE?
answer: Za ka iya kai ƙorafi ga hukumar haraji idan ka lura da kuskure a lissafin PAYE naka.
source: Nigeria Tax Act 2025, Section 13; PAYE Regulations 2025

question: Menene Personal Income Tax?
answer: Harajin kudin shiga na mutum (PIT) haraji ne da ake biya bisa ga kudin shiga na mutum.

question: Waye ke biyan Personal Income Tax?
answer: Duk wani mutum da ke samun kudin shiga a Nijeriya yana da alhakin biyan wannan haraji.

question: Wane irin kudin shiga ake haraji a kai?
answer: Albashi, riba daga kasuwanci, da sauran kudaden shiga ana iya harajinsu.

question: Shin ana harajin duk kudin shiga?
answer: A'a, akwai wasu kudaden shiga da aka ware daga haraji kamar wasu alawus-alawus.

question: Ta yaya ake rage harajin PIT?
answer: Ana rage shi ta hanyar amfani da rangwame da deductions da doka ta amince da su.

question: Shin ana iya samun rangwame a PIT?
answer: Eh, akwai rangwame kamar personal allowance da sauran deductions.

question: Yaya ake lissafa PIT?
answer: Ana lissafa PIT bisa tsarin haraji na matakai (progressive tax rates).

question: Shin dole ne a bayyana duk kudin shiga?
answer: Eh, dole ne a bayyana duk kudin shiga domin kauce wa hukunci.

question: Ta yaya zan yi filing na haraji?
answer: Za ka iya yin filing ta yanar gizo ko a ofishin haraji ta hanyar cike fom da ake bukata.

question: Yaushe ake filing na haraji?
answer: Ana filing na haraji kowace shekara kafin ranar da doka ta kayyade.

question: Me zai faru idan ban yi filing ba?
answer: Rashin filing na iya jawo tara ko hukunci daga hukumar haraji.

question: Zan iya gyara kuskure a filing?
answer: Eh, za ka iya gyara kuskure ta hanyar sake gabatar da bayanai daidai.

question: Shin filing yana bukatar takardu?
answer: Eh, ana bukatar takardu kamar bayanan kudin shiga da sauran hujjoji.

question: Sau nawa ake filing?
answer: Ana yin filing sau daya a shekara.

question: Wa zai iya shigar da bayanin haraji a madadina?
answer: Za ka iya ba wa wakili izini (kamar mai lissafi ko lauya) ya shigar da bayanin haraji a madadinka, amma kai ne ke da alhakin bayanan.

question: Waɗanne matakai ake ɗauka bayan an shigar da bayanin haraji?
answer: Bayan shigarwa, hukumomin haraji na iya duba bayanai, tabbatar da su, sannan su ƙayyade adadin harajin da za a biya.

question: Menene biyan haraji (tax compliance)?
answer: Biyan haraji yana nufin bin doka ta hanyar yin rajista, bayyana kudaden shiga, biyan haraji a kan lokaci, da kuma adana bayanai yadda ya kamata.

question: Ta yaya zan tabbatar da cewa ina bin dokokin haraji?
answer: Ka tabbatar kana da TIN, kana rubuta kudaden shiga da kashe kudi, kana biyan haraji akan lokaci, kuma kana tuntubar kwararre idan ya zama dole.

question: Wadanne takardu ya kamata in adana don haraji?
answer: Ya kamata ka adana rasit, bayanan banki, takardun kasuwanci, da duk wani bayani na kudaden shiga da kashe kudi.

question: Har na tsawon wane lokaci zan adana bayanan haraji?
answer: A Najeriya, ana bukatar a adana bayanan haraji na akalla shekaru shida.

question: Me ya hada da cikakken bin doka ta haraji?
answer: Ya hada da yin rajista, shigar da bayanai daidai, biyan haraji akan lokaci, da kuma kiyaye duk bayanan kudi.

question: Ta yaya zan kara fahimtar harkokin haraji?
answer: Za ka iya karanta dokokin haraji, halartar horo, ko tuntubar kwararru kamar masu lissafi da masu ba da shawara.

question: Shin ƙananan kasuwanci suna bukatar bin dokokin haraji?
answer: Eh, dukkan kasuwanci, babba ko ƙarami, dole ne su bi dokokin haraji a Najeriya.

question: Wane hakki ne mai biyan haraji yake da shi?
answer: Mai biyan haraji yana da hakkin samun bayani, yin ƙorafi, da kuma a yi masa adalci a lokacin tantance haraji.

question: Ta yaya zan tuntubi hukumar haraji idan ina da tambaya?
answer: Za ka iya tuntubar hukumar haraji ta jiha ko ta tarayya ta ofisoshinsu, waya, ko shafukan yanar gizo na hukuma.

question: Me zai faru idan ban biya haraji ba?
answer: Za a iya saka maka tara, karin kudin jinkiri, ko kuma daukar matakin doka a kanka.

question: Me zai faru idan ban shigar da bayanin haraji ba?
answer: Rashin shigarwa na iya haifar da tara, karin kudin jinkiri, da kuma matsalolin doka.

question: Za a iya rage hukuncin haraji?
answer: Eh, a wasu lokuta ana iya rage hukunci idan an nuna nadama ko an biya bashin da wuri.

question: Me ke jawo karin kudin haraji?
answer: Jinkirin biyan haraji ko bayar da bayanan karya na iya jawo karin kudin haraji.

question: Wadanne matakai gwamnati ke dauka kan masu kauce wa haraji?
answer: Gwamnati na iya saka tara, gurfanar da mutum a kotu, ko kuma rufe kasuwanci idan an ki biyan haraji.

question: Zan iya kalubalantar hukuncin haraji?
answer: Eh, kana da damar daukaka kara ko kalubalantar hukunci ta hanyar bin hanyoyin doka.

question: Menene hukuncin kauce wa haraji?
answer: Hukuncin ya hada da tara mai tsanani, biyan bashin haraji, da kuma yiwuwar zaman kurkuku.

question: Ta yaya zan gyara kuskuren haraji?
answer: Za ka iya tuntubar hukumar haraji, ka gyara bayaninka, sannan ka biya duk abin da ake bukata.

question: Ta yaya zan guje wa hukuncin haraji?
answer: Ka biya haraji akan lokaci, ka shigar da bayanai daidai, kuma ka adana dukkan takardu masu muhimmanci.

question: Me ya kamata in yi idan na karɓi gargaɗi daga hukuma kan haraji?
answer: Ya kamata ka duba dalilin gargaɗin, ka gyara kuskuren, sannan ka biya duk abin da ake binsa cikin lokaci don kauce wa tara.

question: Menene VAT kuma ta yaya yake aiki a Nijeriya?
answer: VAT haraji ne da ake ɗora wa kayayyaki da ayyuka. Ana karɓarsa daga masu saye sannan a miƙa shi ga gwamnati.

question: Wa ya kamata ya yi rijistar VAT?
answer: Duk kasuwancin da ke sayar da kaya ko ayyuka masu haraji dole ne ya yi rijistar VAT.

question: Yaya ake lissafa VAT?
answer: Ana lissafa VAT ta hanyar ƙara kaso na haraji (misali 7.5%) a kan farashin kaya ko aiki.

question: Yaushe ake biyan VAT?
answer: Ana biyan VAT kowane wata kafin ranar 21 na wata mai zuwa.

question: Menene bambanci tsakanin VAT da sauran haraji?
answer: VAT ana ɗora shi ne kan kaya da ayyuka, yayin da sauran haraji kamar income tax ana ɗora su kan kuɗin shiga.

question: Shin dukkan kasuwanci suna biyan VAT?
answer: A'a, ƙananan kasuwanci da ke ƙasa da ƙayyadadden kudin shiga na iya samun rangwame.

question: Shin za a iya neman dawo da VAT?
answer: Eh, idan an biya VAT fiye da kima, ana iya neman dawo da shi daga hukuma.

question: Me zai faru idan ba a biya VAT ba?
answer: Za a iya sanya tara ko hukunci ga wanda bai biya VAT ba.

question: Shin masu sana'a suna biyan haraji a Nijeriya?
answer: Eh, masu sana'a da 'yan kasuwa suna biyan harajin kuɗin shiga bisa ribar da suka samu.

question: Ta yaya ake ƙididdige haraji ga masu sana'a?
answer: Ana ƙididdige haraji bisa ribar kasuwanci bayan an cire kuɗaɗen da aka kashe.

question: Wadanne bayanai masu sana'a ya kamata su adana?
answer: Ya kamata su adana rikodin kudin shiga, kashe kuɗi, da sauran muhimman bayanai na kasuwanci.

question: Shin dole ne in yi rajistar haraji idan ni mai sana'a ne?
answer: Eh, dole ne ka yi rajista don samun TIN da biyan haraji yadda doka ta tanada.

question: Ta yaya zan raba kuɗin kasuwanci da na kaina?
answer: Ka raba asusun kasuwanci da na kanka don sauƙin lissafi da biyan haraji.

question: Shin kowane irin kasuwanci yana biyan haraji?
answer: Eh, muddin yana samar da riba, dole ne ya biya haraji.

question: Ta yaya zan tsara bayanan kasuwanci na?
answer: Ta hanyar yin rikodi na yau da kullum na kuɗin shiga da kashe kuɗi.

question: Me zai faru idan kasuwanci bai yi riba ba?
answer: Idan babu riba, haraji na iya raguwa ko kuma ba za a biya ba.

question: Ta yaya zan inganta biyan haraji na kasuwanci?
answer: Ta hanyar kiyaye rikodi daidai da kuma biyan haraji a kan lokaci.

question: Wanene ke samun rangwamen haraji a Nijeriya?
answer: Wasu kungiyoyi kamar na sadaka da na ilimi na iya samun rangwamen haraji.

question: Wadanne kudaden shiga ne ba a saka musu haraji?
answer: Wasu kudade kamar gudummawa ko tallafi na iya zama ba su da haraji.

question: Ta yaya zan san idan ina da rangwamen haraji?
answer: Ka tuntubi hukumar haraji ko ka duba dokokin haraji don tabbatarwa.

question: Shin dalibai suna biyan haraji?
answer: Yawanci dalibai ba sa biyan haraji sai idan suna samun kudin shiga.

question: Shin ana samun rangwame ga masu ritaya?
answer: Eh, wasu kudaden fansho na iya zama ba su da haraji.

question: Wadanne kungiyoyi ba sa biyan haraji?
answer: Kungiyoyin sadaka da addini galibi ba sa biyan haraji idan ba sa neman riba.

question: Shin ana iya rage haraji ta hanyar gudummawa?
answer: Eh, wasu gudummawa na iya rage adadin harajin da za a biya.

question: Ta yaya zan rage nauyin haraji?
answer: Ta amfani da rangwame da kuma kiyaye cikakken rikodi.

question: Shin kyauta tana da haraji?
answer: Wasu kyaututtuka ba sa cikin haraji, amma ya danganta da nau'in su.

question: Wadanne fa'idodi ake samu daga rangwamen haraji?
answer: Yana rage adadin haraji da mutum ko kungiya za ta biya.

question: Menene harajin dijital a Nijeriya?
answer: Harajin dijital yana shafar kasuwancin da ke aiki ta yanar gizo ko dandamali na dijital.

question: Wa ke biyan harajin dijital?
answer: Kamfanonin da ke samar da ayyuka na dijital ga 'yan Nijeriya suna iya biyan wannan haraji.

question: Ta yaya ake tantance harajin dijital?
answer: Ana tantance shi bisa kudin shiga daga ayyukan dijital a cikin kasar.

question: Ta yaya zan biya harajin dijital?
answer: Ta hanyar rajista da kuma bin tsarin hukumar haraji ta yanar gizo.

question: Shin masu kasuwancin online suna biyan haraji?
answer: Eh, idan suna samun kudin shiga daga Najeriya.

question: Wadanne dokoki ne ke kula da harajin dijital?
answer: Dokokin SEP da sauran dokokin haraji na Najeriya ne ke kula da shi.

question: Shin akwai hukunci ga rashin biyan harajin dijital?
answer: Eh, ana iya sanya tara ko wasu hukunci.

question: Shin samun kuɗi da yawa online yana nufin ba za a biya haraji ba?
answer: A'a, duk kudin shiga na iya zama karkashin haraji.

question: Wadanne bayanai zan adana don harajin dijital?
answer: Ya kamata ka adana rikodin kudin shiga, ma'amaloli, da kwastomomi.

question: Ta yaya zan bi dokokin haraji na dijital?
answer: Ta hanyar yin rajista, bayar da rahoto, da kuma biyan haraji a kan lokaci.
